input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8771 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.apache.maven:maven-core:2.0.7; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: Tests that invoke real Maven build goals may read user settings/local repository or attempt repository access; prefer direct component/API coverage or isolated temporary Maven projects if such tests are generated.
Constructor signatures in transitive Maven 2.0.7 artifacts differ from the existing 2.0.6 tests, so generated tests must compile against the resolved 2.0.7 API.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra dependency, Docker image, environment variable, or system property is required before meaningful maven-core coverage is reachable; the observed javac failure is API signature drift in Maven artifact exception constructors, not missing setup.
